title: Return explicit Meshtastic errors for unsupported app operations
description: Why this exists: the app must fail gracefully when users touch Meshtastic features LICHEN does not implement. What needs to be done: enumerate unsupported MVP operations such as Meshtastic RF settings that do not apply, LoRa channel/radio config writes, admin operations, maps/position updates if not supported, telemetry modules, canned messages, store-and-forward, traceroute/range-test, and remote node operations; implement explicit error/no-op responses rather than silent drops. Acceptance criteria: unsupported command table is recorded; tests cover representative unsupported requests; app receives deterministic error or harmless read-only response; docs Bead project-LICHEN-ev5b.7 can consume the same list.
